cfg_statements.code: for i in range(N): s=S[i] L[idx[s]][i+1]=1

for i in range(Q): query=input().split() num=int(query[0]) if num==1: i=int(query[1]) c=query[2] nows=S[i-1] segdict[idx[nows]].update(i,0) segdict[idx[c]].update(i,1) S[i-1]=c else: l=int(query[1]) r=int(query[2]) sub=0 for j in range(26): x=segdict[j].query(l,r+1) if x>0: sub+=1 print(sub)

if num==1: i=int(query[1]) c=query[2] nows=S[i-1] segdict[idx[nows]].update(i,0) segdict[idx[c]].update(i,1) S[i-1]=c else: l=int(query[1]) r=int(query[2]) sub=0 for j in range(26): x=segdict[j].query(l,r+1) if x>0: sub+=1 print(sub)
for j in range(26): x=segdict[j].query(l,r+1) if x>0: sub+=1
for i, x in enumerate(init_value): self.data[i + self.N0 - 1] = x
for i in range(self.N0 - 2, -1, -1): self.data[i] = self.segfunc(self.data[2 * i + 1], self.data[2 * i + 2])
while k: k = (k - 1) // 2 self.data[k] = self.segfunc(self.data[k * 2 + 1], self.data[k * 2 + 2])
while L < R: if L & 1: a.append(L - 1) L += 1 if R & 1: R -= 1 b.append(R - 1) L >>= 1 R >>= 1
for i in a + b[::-1]: res = self.segfunc(res, self.data[i])
